stemHtml: From the screen height of 50 ft, a single-engined piston aeroplane performs a straight-out climb in visual meteorological conditions with a rate of climb of 500 ft/min, a TAS of 110 kt, NIL wind. What will be the expected height clearance of a group of trees that are 9 m tall and located at a distance of 352 m on the extended runway centre line from reference zero?
